name: toweringmedia/module-usps-rest-api
description: Real-time USPS shipping rates at Magento 2 checkout using USPS REST API v3. Secure OAuth2 authentication replacing legacy USPS Web Tools integrations. Built-in rate caching improves checkout speed and reduces API calls. Supports Ground Advantage, Priority Mail, Express, and First-Class services. Includes admin Test Connection and Test Rate tools plus optional debug logging
